scripts.build: npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run build -w @groceryview/image-cache && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run build -w @groceryview/image-cache && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/__tests__/*.test.js
